summary: End-to-end testing of MemoryMate (FastAPI + React + MongoDB + Claude Sonnet 4.6). Backend pytest suite covers all 36 critical endpoints (auth, memories+AI, reminders, medications, appointments, people+explain, places, notes, alerts, chat, today summary, caregiver summary, admin stats/users/logs/collections) with 100% pass rate. Frontend Playwright tests verified all three login flows (patient demo button, caregiver typed credentials, admin typed credentials) correctly redirect to /patient, /caregiver, /admin respectively — the previously reported 'caregiver stays on /login' concern is NOT reproducible; login redirect works in-browser. Memory record with AI extraction, gentle Q&A chat assistant, caregiver AI summary, and all admin sub-pages all load and integrate with the backend correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: email is lowercased on register/login (good).
routes.py is 583 lines — borderline; consider splitting per-resource modules when adding more features.
MongoDB _id is properly excluded everywhere via PROJ = {"_id": 0} — good.
All endpoints use Pydantic models for input validation — good.
Reminders update endpoint silently accepts unknown status strings (only 'done' triggers completed_at). Consider validating status against a fixed set.
GET /api/chat returns full history but POST /api/chat only returns the latest answer — consider also returning the assistant message id/created_at for UI ordering.
Frontend AuthContext uses user=null as 'loading' sentinel and user=false as 'guest'; works but a clearer 'loading' boolean would be safer for future maintenance.
No rate limiting on /api/chat or /api/memories — given they call Claude, a per-user throttle would protect the LLM key budget.
Login does not implement brute-force lockout (out of scope for current PRD which uses simple JWT auth, not the cookie+lockout playbook).
test_credentials: Admin: admin@memorymate.app / admin123 | Patient: omar@memorymate.app / Patient123! | Caregiver: sarah@memorymate.app / Caregiver123!
seed_data_creation: Seed runs on backend startup (idempotent) — produced patient Omar, caregiver Sarah, demo reminders/medications/appointments/people/places/notes/memories. Tests created TEST_-prefixed users + ephemeral items and cleaned them up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is reusable. All 36 assertions pass against the live preview URL https://gentle-support-15.preview.emergentagent.com. Demo accounts are seeded automatically on startup. AI calls (Claude Sonnet 4.6 via Emergent key) take ~5–15s — generous timeouts already in tests (60–120s).
rca_of_reported_concern: Main agent reported a screenshot showing /login after caregiver login. Could not reproduce. Playwright test (caregiver_typed_login) types sarah@memorymate.app / Caregiver123! and clicking the submit button (data-testid=login-submit-btn) consistently redirects to /caregiver. Likely root cause of the screenshot: it was captured before navigation completed (Login.js calls navigate(role-based path) right after toast.success — there is a brief moment where the URL is still /login). No code change needed.
